summary: Tested Location-Based Booking with Service Area Validation features. Fixed critical bug: Missing Navigation icon import in PhotographerBookingsManager.js causing 'Illegal constructor' error. All backend API tests pass (7/7). Frontend Service Area & Travel Fees settings UI working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing Navigation icon import from lucide-react causing 'Illegal constructor' runtime error when opening Edit Rates modal

critical_code_review_comments: Navigation icon was used but not imported in PhotographerBookingsManager.js - FIXED by adding to import statement
seed_data_creation: Created photographer user test_photographer_221@test.com with basic subscription
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Area & Travel Fees features are fully functional. ImpactZonePicker component in ScheduledBookingDrawer.js has GPS location, nearby spots, range validation, and travel surcharge display. To test the full booking flow with ImpactZonePicker, need to navigate to a photographer profile > Check Availability > Book Scheduled > Continue to Booking > Select Date/Time > Continue to Location step.

backend: GET /api/photographer/{id}/pricing returns service_radius_miles, home_latitude, home_longitude, charges_travel_fees, travel_surcharges
PUT /api/photographer/{id}/pricing saves all service area fields
frontend: PhotographerBookingsManager Edit Rates modal opens without error
Service Area & Travel Fees section visible with all fields
Service Radius numeric stepper (25 miles default)
Home Location display with Set GPS button
Travel Fee Tiers display when toggle is ON
